lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant damage and rust. The interior is heavily worn and damaged. It requires major mechanical repairs to be fully operational.

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows the expected signs of regular use over the years. The exterior paint has begun to fade on the roof and hood, and there are several noticeable scratches and small dings along the side panels. Inside, the interior is functional but shows visible wear on the driver's seat and some light staining on the carpets. Mechanically, the car is a reliable runner; however, a potential buyer should be aware that the tires are nearing the end of their tread life and the rear brakes will likely need service within the next few months. It is a solid, honest daily driver that prioritizes utility over aesthetics.

The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has a few minor scratches but is otherwise well-kept. The interior shows light wear from regular use. The engine and transmission are functioning properly and have been regularly serviced.

This vehicle is in fair condition and represents a solid option for someone looking for reliable transportation at a lower price point. The exterior has some noticeable cosmetic wear, including several scratches and a minor dent on the rear passenger door. Inside, the upholstery shows signs of use, and there is some visible wear on the driver's seat bolsters. Mechanically, the car starts and runs consistently, though the tires will likely need replacement within the next few months and the air conditioning takes a few minutes to reach a comfortable temperature. It has been regularly serviced, but a buyer should expect some upcoming maintenance tasks typical for a car of this age and mileage.

Get ready to drive home in perfection! This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, having been meticulously maintained to look and perform exactly like it did on the showroom floor. With its flawless exterior and pristine interior, it’s a rare find for any enthusiast looking for a truly like-new experience.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been maintained to a high standard and exhibits consistent mechanical reliability. The exterior maintains its professional luster, complemented by a well-preserved interior that reflects diligent ownership. Thoroughly inspected and prepared for immediate acquisition, this offering represents a sophisticated balance of performance and value for the discerning driver.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and she’s been such a joy to drive. It's in really solid shape and has been well-maintained over the years, so it’s totally ready to hit the road for its next big adventure! It runs super smooth and still looks great parked in the driveway. If you're looking for a dependable, quality ride that won't let you down, you've found it. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, equipped with individual throttle bodies and a double-VANOS variable valve timing system. Power is delivered to the rear wheels via a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential. The chassis remains composed thanks to M-spec suspension geometry and recently inspected subframe mounting points. Performance is further enhanced by a crisp throttle response and the signature metallic rasp of the M-tuned exhaust. Mechanically sorted with up-to-date valve adjustments and cooling system preventative maintenance, this machine offers pure analog engagement for the discerning enthusiast.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Clean title. Reliable performance. Minor cosmetic wear. Well-maintained.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of performance and value, maintained with care and ready for its next owner. The exterior presents beautifully in its original finish, showing only minor, expected road wear such as small stone chips on the front fascia. Inside, the cabin remains a comfortable sanctuary; the premium upholstery is free of tears, and all power features—from the intuitive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—operate exactly as they should. Under the hood, the engine is responsive and quiet, benefiting from a documented history of consistent maintenance and fluid services. The tires have significant tread remaining, and the suspension provides a smooth, composed ride over city streets and highways alike. It is a reliable, well-sorted car that offers a premium driving experience without the brand-new price tag.

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning motorist, balancing mechanical integrity with a refined aesthetic presence. Meticulously maintained to ensure consistent performance, it features a well-preserved interior and a robust service history. An authoritative choice for those seeking reliability and a superior driving experience.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this model offers a superior driving experience and consistent reliability. It represents a premier selection for the discerning driver who demands excellence and long-term value.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it's been such a gem. It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-loved, making it perfect for your daily commutes or weekend getaways. It drives smooth and looks great—you're definitely going to enjoy getting behind the wheel of this one! Feel free to reach out if you want to come see it!

Available is a driver-focused E92 M3 featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8. This powerplant utilizes eight individual throttle bodies and a split-sump oiling system to maintain lubrication during high lateral G-loads. Power is managed via a 6-speed manual gearbox and sent to the rear wheels through the M Variable Differential Lock. The chassis maintains its precision with aluminum-intensive multi-link suspension and a hydraulic steering rack for uncompromised feedback. Preventative maintenance is up to date, including rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator servicing. While the paint exhibits minor road-wear consistent with its mileage, the mechanical synchronization and compression across all cylinders remain within tight tolerances. A mechanically robust example for the enthusiast who prioritizes driving dynamics.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Mechanically sound with minor cosmetic wear.

This 2017 Porsche 718 Cayman is a meticulously maintained example of precision German engineering. Finished in a sophisticated Agate Grey Metallic, the exterior retains a deep, mirror-like luster, with only minor stone chips on the front valence that reflect its honest road use. The cabin is an oasis of driver-focused luxury, featuring black leather upholstery that remains supple and free of any significant wear or odors. Every electronic component, from the responsive PCM touchscreen to the dual-zone climate control, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this vehicle is in excellent health, benefiting from a rigorous service schedule performed exclusively at authorized service centers. The 2.0L turbocharged engine delivers punchy, reliable power, paired with a PDK transmission that offers lightning-fast, smooth shifts. It currently sits on 19-inch wheels with high-performance tires showing deep tread. This is a turn-key sports car, ideal for someone seeking a reliable daily driver or a spirited weekend companion without the showroom-new price tag.

This distinguished vehicle offers an exceptional synthesis of performance and enduring value. Maintained to a high standard, it exhibits consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking a reliable, high-caliber automotive investment.

Presenting a vehicle that exemplifies consistent maintenance and reliable performance. This well-appointed model offers a refined driving experience, featuring a clean interior and a mechanically sound powertrain. Each component has undergone a rigorous professional inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for safety and longevity. This offering represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of sophistication and proven dependability.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and it's been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for someone looking for a reliable car that still looks great on the road. It runs smoothly and is ready for its next adventure with you! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions—I'd love to see it go to a good home.

This driver-focused machine features a high-revving DOHC inline-six mated to a crisp 6-speed close-ratio manual transmission. Recent service includes a full cooling system overhaul and fresh bushings for the multi-link rear suspension. Power is delivered through a mechanical limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal corner-exit traction. The chassis remains rigid, benefiting from factory-spec strut tower reinforcement. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with spirited use, the mechanical vitals—including compression across all cylinders and variable valve timing—are within tight tolerances. Equipped with staggered lightweight alloys and upgraded monoblock calipers for superior thermal management under heavy braking.
Used car. Good condition. Clean interior. Runs well. Regular maintenance performed.

This well-maintained vehicle offers a refined driving experience, blending reliable performance with a clean, professional aesthetic. The exterior paint retains a deep, consistent shine, showing only the minor, superficial signs of road use that come with careful driving. Inside, the cabin is remarkably well-preserved; the premium upholstery is free of significant wear or staining, and every feature—from the intuitive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—operates flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, having followed a strict preventative maintenance schedule. The engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts are crisp, and the suspension provides a comfortable, quiet ride. With plenty of tread left on the tires and a recent full-service inspection completed, this car is ready for its next owner to drive away with complete confidence.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it delivers a sophisticated driving experience. Each component has been vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality and long-term reliability. We invite you to experience the superior engineering and refined comfort of this distinguished model.

Presenting an exceptional opportunity to acquire a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both performance and sophistication. This unit has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Offering a refined driving experience, this vehicle represents a premier selection for the discerning motorist seeking value without compromise.

Hey there! Thanks for checking out my car! 🚗 It's been such a reliable ride and is still in wonderful shape, just waiting for its next adventure. I've taken great care of it, so it runs smoothly and looks fantastic. It’s perfect for someone looking for a dependable, well-loved vehicle that's ready to go. Drop me a message if you're interested—I'd love to see it go to a good home!

Offering a driver-focused 2004 BMW M3 featuring the legendary S54B32 power unit. This high-revving 3.2L atmospheric straight-six delivers linear power through individual throttle bodies to a crisp Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive Vanos overhaul and subframe reinforcement, ensuring structural rigidity under high lateral G-loads. Equipped with a variable M-differential lock and upgraded bushings, the chassis dynamics remain precise. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with its enthusiast use, the powertrain exhibits excellent compression and mechanical health. A robust, analog performance machine optimized for the purist.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable daily driver.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive condition, perfect for a driver who values both reliability and aesthetics. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, showing only minor, age-appropriate character marks that are barely noticeable at a glance. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean and smoke-free; the premium upholstery is well-preserved with no significant wear, and all electronic features—including the infotainment system and climate control—operate exactly as they should. Mechanically, the car is sound, benefiting from a documented history of regular service and recent fluid changes. It starts up effortlessly, shifts smoothly through all gears, and provides a quiet, composed ride on the highway. This is a turn-key example that looks great and drives even better.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined interior, this unit offers a sophisticated driving experience. Each component has been vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and aesthetic presentation. A superior choice for those seeking reliability and prestige without compromise.
